name: obnicode
description: Execute YAML-defined Explorer view actions and document formatters.

obnicode.configFile.description: Workspace-relative YAML configuration file containing Explorer view actions and document formatter commands.

obnicode.systemStatus.enabled.description: Show CPU, memory, and storage usage in the VS Code status bar.

obnicode.systemStatus.updateIntervalMs.description: Refresh interval in milliseconds for the system status bar item.

obnicode.systemStatus.diskPath.description: Path used to determine storage usage. Defaults to the first workspace folder, or the user home directory when no workspace is open.

scripts.validate:examples: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const YAML=require('yaml'); const parsed=YAML.parse(fs.readFileSync('examples/obnicode.yaml','utf8')); if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') throw new Error('examples/obnicode.yaml');"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate:json && npm run validate:examples
scripts.build:vsix: npm run check && npm run compile && vsce package
